post.title: Tariff war, Bipolar World, Recession, Weekly post (31th march - 4th April)

post.description: Geos, Tariffs, Politics, Volatility, Underpriced left-tail
post.truncated_body_text: In this post, I will explain the relationship between the EU and the US in the context of the tariff war, and what risks the transforming world order is facing. From this, you will also understand the direct and indirect impacts all of this has on the markets.
